top_signals.title: China Mine Explosion Sees Coking Coal Jump by Daily Limit
top_signals.summary: China coking coal jumped by the daily limit after a deadly mine blast in Shanxi province sparked fears of broader supply disruptions from heightened safety inspections across the sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
